# Experiment README Template

Use this template for `project/experiments/EXP-YYYYMMDD-NNN/README.md`.
Create an experiment record only when the project is running explicit experiments that need readable summaries and later comparison.

## Goal
What did this experiment try to learn or prove?

## Inputs
Which model, config, data, prompt, or environment inputs mattered?

## What changed
Compared with the previous run, what changed?

## Headline result
What is the one-paragraph summary?

## Key metrics
Which few metrics matter most?

## Top failures
What failed or stayed weak?

## Decision
What should happen next: continue, rollback, rerun, or expand?

## Related artifacts
Which configs, logs, metrics, or reviews should a reader inspect next?
